name: Jantsa Jant Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Jantsa Jant Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells steel wheels for commercial, industrial, and agricultural machinery primarily in Turkey. The company offers agricultural and multi-purpose wheels for tractors, implements, trailers, forestry, harvesters, sprayers, and row-crop products; industrial wheels for use in construction, material handling, earthmoving, and mining applications; and commercial wheels for trucks, buses, and trailers, as well as military wheels. It supplies its products to OEM and aftermarket customers. The company also exports its products to approximately 85 countries. Jantsa Jant Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Aydin, Turkey.
